messages.content: Question 5 : Which of the following is/are element(s) of the penetration pre-engagement phase? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A Negotiating contracts option B Developing the rules of engagement document option C All of these option D Creating the statement of work
option C All of these

What will one typically include in the rules of engagement document during penetration testing? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  All of these option B  The security controls that could potentially detect or prevent testing option C  Location of the testing option D  Testing timeline
Option A  All of these

Which term is used to define the practice of mimicking a threat actor by using the same methodologies and tools to find and exploit vulnerabilities with the permission of the system or network owner? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Penetration testing option B  All of these option C  Ethical hacking option D  Pen testing
Option C Ethical hacking

Which of the following is a type of penetration testing where the tester starts out with a significant amount of information about the organization and its infrastructure? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Partially known environment option B  Unknown environment option C  Known environment option D  None of these
Option C Known environment

Which of the following can help defend against pivoting during a compromise? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  WAP option B  All of these option C  WAF option D  Network segmentation
Option D Network segmentation

Question 10 : Which term is used when a penetration tester uses public records to perform passive reconnaissance? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  OSINT gathering option B  Shodan option C  Banner fingerprinting option D  Scanning
Option A OSINT gathering

Which tool can be used to perform active reconnaissance? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  All of these option B  Nmap option C  Nessus option D  Nikto
Option B Nmap

Which condition occurs when an attacker or malware compromises one VM and then attacks the hypervisor? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  VM sprawl option B  Hypervisor sprawl option C  VM escape option D  Hypervisor escape
Option D Hypervisor escape

Which of the following cloud service models will you use if you want to host applications on virtual machines, deploy load balancers, and use storage buckets? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  PaaS option B  IaaS option C  None of these option D  SaaS
Option B IaaS

Question 3 : Which of the following cloud deployments is a mix of public and private cloud solutions where multiple organizations can share the public portion? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Community cloud option B  PaaS option C  SaaS option D  MSSP cloud
Option A Community cloud

What type of company or organization provides services to manage your security devices and can also help monitor and respond to security incidents? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  MSSP option B  PaaS provider option C  SaaS provider option D  Serverless provider
Option A MSSP

Which of the following organizations delivers network, application, system, and management services using a pay-as-you-go model? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Managed service provider (MSP) option B  SaaS provider option C  PaaS provider option D  XaaS provider
Option D XaaS provider

Which of the following are computer systems that run from resources stored on a central server or from the cloud instead of a local (on-premises) system? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  VPCs option B  Edge devices option C  Thin clients option D  Containers
Option C Thin clients

What condition could occur when an organization can no longer effectively control and manage all the VMs on a network or in the cloud? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Hypervisor escape option B  Hypervisor sprawl option C  VM sprawl option D  VM escape
Option C VM sprawl

Which term describes an ecosystem of resources and applications in new network services (including 5G and IoT)? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Edge computing option B  None of these option C  SaaS option D  VPC
Option A Edge computing

Which of the following is a technology and a solution to manage, deploy, and orchestrate containers? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Docker Swarm option B  Apache Mesos option C  Kubernetes option D  All of these
Option D All of these

Google Drive, Office 365, and Dropbox are examples of which of the following types of cloud service? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  SaaS option B  All of these option C  PaaS option D  IaaS
Option A SaaS

Which term is used when you have a near duplicate of the original site of the organization that can be up and running within minutes? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Cluster site option B  Warm site option C  Hot site option D  Cold site
Option B Warm site

Question 2 : Which of the following are privacy laws or regulations?  Each correct answer represents a complete solution. Choose two. This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. A option A PCI-DSS B option B CCPA C option C GDPR D option D FedRamp
Option B CCPA and Option C GDPR

Which of the following is a primary goal of configuration management? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Ensuring that any changes done to the infrastructure do not affect the underlying organization’s IT budget option B  All of these option C  Maintaining computer systems, servers, network infrastructure, and software in a desired, consistent state option D  Reducing the cost of acquiring computer systems, servers, network infrastructure, and software used for information security
Option C Maintaining computer systems, servers, network infrastructure, and software in a desired, consistent state.

In a _________, you configure one or more DNS servers to provide false results to attackers and redirect them to areas in the network where you can observe their tactics and techniques. This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  DNS sinkhole option B  DNS tunnel option C  DNS Zone transfer option D  None of these
Option A DNS sinkhole

You were hired to deploy a system to prevent unauthorized use and transmission of confidential information. What should you prioritize to protect and encrypt? This type of question contains radio buttons and checkboxes for selection of options. Use Tab for navigation and Enter or space to select the option. option A  Data at rest option B  Data in use option C  Data in motion option D  All of these
Option A Data at rest.
does salesforce offer on site
As an AI language model, I am not sure which service or device you are asking about. Could you please clarify and provide more information about your question?
